title: Test Scenario
description: A full day on LEGO Mars from morning to evening. Tests inventory persistence, character tracking, and world rule consistency across 100 turns in a single continuous playthrough.

turns.user_input: Wake up in my quarters. What does my room look like?
Try to sit up in bed
Get up and check if I have anything on my shelf
Take the welcome packet and the mug. Head to the kitchen
Who's in the kitchen this early?
Introduce myself to whoever's here. I'm new
What do they look like? Describe their minifigure details
Ask them what they do at the colony
Try to pour myself some coffee with these claw hands
Ask if they can show me around today
Follow them into the corridor. What's between the domes?
Head to the operations dome. What's in here?
Meet the operations chief. What's their name and what do they look like?
Ask the chief what my job assignments are for today
The chief gives me a toolkit. What's in it?
Check my inventory. What am I carrying now?
Ask the chief if there are any areas of the colony that are off-limits
Ask my guide what they think about the operations chief
Head to the greenhouse. How are the plants doing?
Check the temperature reading in the greenhouse
Meet the gardener. What's their name and what are they growing?
The gardener offers me a tomato. Take it
Ask the gardener if they know my guide. What's their relationship?
Eat the tomato. I'm hungry
Notice a leak in one of the greenhouse pipes. Use a wrench from my toolkit to tighten it
Head to the recreational dome. What's it like in here?
There's a pool in here. Jump in
Who else is hanging out in the rec dome?
Introduce myself. Learn their name and what they do
They mention someone I should meet. Who?
Ask about the colony gossip. Any drama going on?
Head to the garage. What's in here?
Meet the mechanic. What do they look like? Any distinctive features?
The mechanic is working on the rover. Ask what's wrong with it
Offer to help. Use a tool from my toolkit
While working, find a strange small gear piece under the rover. Pick it up
Show the gear piece to the mechanic. Do they recognize it?
Check my full inventory
Ask the mechanic if three of us could take the rover out
Ask the mechanic what they think of the operations chief
Head back to the canteen for lunch. Who's there?
Is my morning guide here? What are they doing?
Sit down with them. Try to sit in a chair
Tell them about the gear piece I found. What do they think?
Someone new sits down with us. Who are they?
Ask this new person what they do and what they look like
Ask them what the most dangerous thing that's happened at the colony is
After lunch, head outside the domes to check the solar panels. Suit up
How much time do I have in this oxygen suit?
Walk across the surface to the solar array. What does Mars look like?
Examine the solar panels. Any damage?
Use the screwdriver from my toolkit to fix a loose panel
How much oxygen do I have left?
I notice one of the domes from out here has a crack. Which one?
Head back inside before oxygen runs out. How much time did I use?
Ask the operations chief about the cracked dome I saw from outside
Is that area sealed off? Can I go there?
Go to the greenhouse. Check the temperature again
Is the gardener still here? Ask them about the pipe I fixed earlier — is it holding?
The gardener gives me a small cactus as a thank you. Take it
What am I carrying now? Full inventory check
Go find the person from the rec dome I met earlier. Where are they now?
Ask them about the person they said I should meet. Can they introduce me?
Follow them to meet this new person. Where do we find them?
Introduce myself. What does this person look like and what's their role?
Show them the gear piece from under the rover. Any idea what it's from?
They say it might be from the sealed-off dome. Ask them to explain
I want to go check. Can I get permission from the chief?
Go ask the operations chief for permission to enter the sealed dome
What does the chief say? Can I go in with a suit?
Suit up and enter the sealed dome. What does it look like inside?
How much oxygen do I have?
Look around for anything that matches the gear piece
I find an old machine. It's missing a part. Try the gear piece
Did it fit? What does the machine do?
Check oxygen. Time to leave?
Head back out and remove the suit
Go tell the mechanic what I found in the sealed dome
Is the mechanic still in the garage?
Describe what I found. What's their reaction?
The mechanic wants to go check it out too. Can we take the rover?
My guide wants to come too. Can all three of us fit in the rover?
Leave one person behind. Take the rover with just the mechanic
Someone's hat blows off from the airlock draft. Whose?
Pick it up and give it back. Head to the canteen for dinner
Who's at dinner? List everyone I recognize
Sit near the gardener. Ask how the plants are doing after the pipe fix
The operations chief makes an announcement. What is it?
Watch how the mechanic reacts to the announcement
Watch how my morning guide reacts
Someone asks to borrow my toolkit. Give them the wrench but keep the rest
What's in my toolkit now without the wrench?
After dinner, head to the rec dome to relax. Who's there?
Try to write in my welcome packet about today with these claw hands
Someone from dinner follows me in. Who? What do they want to talk about?
They tell me something surprising about the operations chief. What?
Head back to my quarters for bed. Pass by the sealed dome bulkhead on the way. Is it still sealed?
Get to my room. Put the cactus on my shelf
What's everything I still have on me?
Lie down and think about everyone I met today. Who do I trust?
